note: Codex returned 'REVISE' with 2 critical + 4 high + 4 medium findings. Treated as APPROVE_WITH_FIXES since all findings enumerable and directly addressable.

issues.title: Lease lacks fencing token
issues.resolution: lease_epoch bigint; assert_lease_epoch fn; workers thread epoch into every mutating call; Probe G added.

issues.title: SIGTERM drain overlap
issues.resolution: Stop-ticks-first, heartbeat continues, 30s hard deadline, 5s forced-cancel join; Probe F.

issues.title: Back-pressure flaps/starves safety jobs
issues.resolution: Hysteresis enter>70%/exit<60% over 3 samples; per-job policy Skip vs Degrade; max 10 skip streak alert; Probe H.

issues.title: Clock skew risk
issues.resolution: DB now() authoritative for all TTL/threshold; monotonic timers for local intervals only; UTC timestamptz throughout.

issues.title: SECURITY DEFINER hardening missing
issues.resolution: Owner metaldocs_admin, SET search_path, REVOKE FROM PUBLIC, GRANT writer only, arg regex.

issues.title: Deploy/rollback undefined
issues.resolution: 5-step choreography; jobs ENABLE_* default FALSE; per-job ramp order; rollback disables flags first.

issues.title: Observability gaps
issues.resolution: Added acquire_attempts, lease_steal_count, heartbeat_latency/failures, drain_duration, skip_streak metrics.

issues.title: Exporter secrets + isolation
issues.resolution: SECRETS_PROVIDER interface; TLS+timeout+circuit breaker; dedicated goroutine pool size 2.

issues.title: Timezone ambiguity
issues.resolution: UTC timestamptz throughout; DST edge probe I.

issues.title: Reaper race
issues.resolution: SELECT FOR UPDATE + compare-and-delete same tx; audit governance_event per reap; Probe J.

action_taken: All 10 fixes applied inline. Structural additions: fencing token, drain sequence, hysteresis, deploy ramp. Round 2 skipped — findings enumerable.
